The Greatest Farmer Website

Introduction

The website is a platform for exchanging farming produce and agriculture practices within the local community. This project was done for CSE305 (Software Engineering) with Javascript, PHP, HTML and CSS.
The website can be accessed HERE.
**For testing: Use (username: bcollins - password: benjamin123) to test the functionalities in FARMER site.
Use (username: bcooper - password: bob123) to test the functionalities in BUYER site.
Head to my github page to see source code.

Functionality Highlights

  • Login, Sign Up
  • User's dashboard - Overview of Subscriptions, Order, Saved Post and Cart
  • Farmer account gets to maintain its own inventory and write posts
  • Buyer account gets to order, leave reviews and comments, see blog posts and save to the account
  • Blog posting and Keyword Searching
  • Farmer and Farming Produce Rating System

Role within the project

The project was done in a team of 3 people. I was responsible for the database design (coming up with and optimizing relational schemas), writing back-end codes (for the "Farmer" module) in PHP and connecting to website's front-end using Javascript (jQuery).
